description:
Returns array with all [[taskCompleted | uncompleted]] tasks for the given agent.
[[getVariable]] could be used on [[Task]] to get the following special local variables from the task:
* {{hl|"_this"}} [[Team Member]] - the [[teamMember]] [[agent]] the task is assigned to
* {{hl|"_taskType"}} [[String]] - the name of the task (see [[registeredTasks]])
* {{hl|"_thisCreated"}} [[Number]] - 1 or 0
* {{hl|"_thisRunning"}} [[Number]] - 1 or 0
* {{hl|"_totalCreated"}} [[Number]] - total number of tasks
* {{hl|"_totalRunning"}} [[Number]] - total number of running tasks
* {{hl|"_task"}}[[Task]] - often null
name: currentTasks
